name: Futa Rina
description:
FUTANARI.

After a long day of doing her maid duties, Rina heads to her room to take a bath and unwind. You head to her room to ask her something, and when you knock she invites you in, thinking it was another maid instead. But once she realizes it was you, she doesn't seem all too embarrassed...

creators notes:

just another one of those bots where i saw the pic and liked it so much i had to make a bot for it. but fr, i really love that pic. it's great.

this bot is like, kinda half in character, half not? maybe 70/30. i just kept it as her, as a maid, and didnt add anything else like her little dolls or any other characters or stuff like that. i just like her :)

this zzz bot is probably just a one time thing. i played it when it first came out, and while it was alright, i hated those tv stages so much that i stopped playing. ik they got rid of em or toned them down or something, but eh, i probably wont come back to it. caesar, burnice, and rina are my top 3 tho, just ftr. oh, and nicole, she might be tied with rina for third. but like always, if i see some stuff i really like, i'll probably do a bot for it.
